task:
A pre-seeded Zotero library is at /home/user/Zotero/zotero.sqlite, and a PDF is provided at /home/user/Documents/bert_paper.pdf.

On the existing item 'BERT: Pre-training of Deep Bidirectional Transformers':
1. Attach /home/user/Documents/bert_paper.pdf as a stored child attachment.
2. Assign the tag 'important' to the item.

After saving, the BERT item must have at least one PDF attachment child and must be tagged 'important'. Leave Zotero running.
